title: astragalus cusickii var. sterilis
intro: Astragalus cusickii var. sterilis, also known as Cusick's milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This perennial herb has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which allow the body to resist stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus cusickii var. sterilis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of this herb include improved energy levels, enhanced immune function, and reduced symptoms of fatigue and stress; it can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture for consumption.
